summary: EXP-424 investigated ISS-2103 (Part 6.13 dangling cross-references). Finding: the dangling-pointer half of the issue was already resolved by ISS-2025 (2026-05-16). The underlying integration-decision question remains open. Recommend pushing EXP-295 P0 to the integration queue per operator's standing Option D choice; close ISS-2103 as superseded.
